Hi, I'm
Duong Ngoc Vu

Undergraduate Researcher · Business AI Lab, NEU

I research AI for Healthcare and Fraud Detection - building multimodal deep learning frameworks and graph neural networks under supervision of Dr. Thien Van Luong.

View Research Contact Me
🔬

AI Research

NEU · 2024–

Scroll

// 01. about

About Me

I am an undergraduate researcher at Business AI Lab, National Economics University, working on AI for Healthcare and Graph-based Fraud Detection under Dr. Thien Van Luong.

I am actively seeking Research Assistant and PhD opportunities in machine learning, computer vision, or medical AI, starting 2027.

Research Interests

// 02. research

Research Focus

Building AI systems that solve real-world problems in healthcare and financial security.

HC

AI for Healthcare

Medical Imaging MRI Analysis Clinical AI

Multimodal deep learning frameworks for spine pathology diagnosis (Pfirrmann grading) on MRI sequences. Building benchmark datasets for standardized evaluation of clinical AI systems.

FD

Fraud Detection

Blockchain Graph Neural Networks Ethereum

Structural temporal graph networks for detecting fraudulent transactions on Ethereum. Feature selection techniques and dynamic graph representation for financial security.

AT

Attention Mechanisms

Transformers Cross-Attention Multi-scale

Designing cross-sequence attention architectures that fuse multi-scale visual features across different MRI modalities for robust pathology localization and grading.

BD

Benchmark Datasets

Dataset Curation Annotation Evaluation

Creating standardized, well-annotated datasets (PhenSPINE) to enable fair and reproducible comparison of deep learning methods on spine MRI clinical data.

// 03. publications

Publications

2026

PhenSPINE: A Standardized Benchmark for Spine Pathology Diagnosis

Featured

Duong Ngoc Vu , Hai Son Nguyen , Trong-Nghia Nguyen , Bien Tran Van , Trang Mai Xuan , Huan Vu , Thien Van Luong

CITA 2026 · 15th Conference on Information Technology and its Applications

A standardized benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for spine pathology diagnosis, enabling fair comparison of deep learning methods on clinical MRI data.

Medical Imaging Benchmark Spine Healthcare
2026

CrossSpine: Multi-scale Cross-sequence Attention for Pfirrmann Grading

Featured

Hai Son Nguyen , Duong Ngoc Vu , Trong-Nghia Nguyen , Bien Tran Van , Van-Dem Pham , Trang Mai Xuan , Huan Vu , Thien Van Luong

CITA 2026 · 15th Conference on Information Technology and its Applications

A multi-scale cross-sequence attention framework for automated Pfirrmann grading of spinal disc degeneration from MRI images.

Medical Imaging Spine Deep Learning
